violations.description: INSECT RODENT ANIMAL CONTROL (3 pts): Dead or trapped pests noted not being removed from the establishment in a timely manner. Fly strips noted very full and need to be removed more frequently.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Soap dispenser noted not in good repair.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls under and around in place equipment and in walk-in freezer noted in need of cleaning.
